title: Find My Device - Play/Stop - multiple tries and exits
scenario: Find My Device play/stop toggle does not correctly control tone playback after repeated start/stop cycles in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Poly Bluetooth headset connected.
5. If prompted, allow GPS location access.
6. Tap the Play button to start the Find My Device tone.
7. Wait for the tone to play for a few seconds.
8. Tap the Stop button to stop the Find My Device tone.
expected: The Find My Device tone plays correctly each time Play is tapped and stops immediately each time Stop is tapped, with no audio glitches, delays, or failures after repeated start/stop cycles.
